import os,sys,json,time,torch,torch.nn as nn,torch.distributed as dist
from torch.nn.parallel import DistributedDataParallel as DDP
from torch.utils.data import DataLoader,DistributedSampler
from torchvision import transforms
from model import CLIPClassifier
from dataset import FMoWDataset
def main():
    lr=int(os.environ.get('LOCAL_RANK',0));torch.cuda.set_device(lr)
    dist.init_process_group('nccl');rank=dist.get_rank();ws=dist.get_world_size()
    dev=torch.device('cuda',lr);im=rank==0
    ep=int(os.environ.get('EPOCHS','5'));bs=int(os.environ.get('BS','32'))
    blr=float(os.environ.get('LR','1e-5'));dd=os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR','/data')
    it=os.environ.get('RAB_ITERATION','0');ld=f'logs/iter_{it}';cd='checkpoints'
    if im:os.makedirs(ld,exist_ok=True);os.makedirs(cd,exist_ok=True)
    m=[0.48145466,0.4578275,0.40821073];s=[0.26862954,0.26130258,0.27577711]
    ttf=transforms.Compose([transforms.RandomHorizontalFlip(),transforms.RandomVerticalFlip(),transforms.RandomRotation(15),transforms.ColorJitter(0.2,0.2,0.2),transforms.ToTensor(),transforms.Normalize(m,s)])
    vtf=transforms.Compose([transforms.ToTensor(),transforms.Normalize(m,s)])
    tds=FMoWDataset(dd,'train',ttf);vds=FMoWDataset(dd,'val',vtf)
    ts=DistributedSampler(tds,ws,rank,True);vs=DistributedSampler(vds,ws,rank,False)
    tl=DataLoader(tds,bs,sampler=ts,num_workers=4,pin_memory=True,drop_last=True)
    vl=DataLoader(vds,bs,sampler=vs,num_workers=4,pin_memory=True)
    if im:print(f'Train:{len(tds)},Val:{len(vds)},GPUs:{ws}')
    cm='openai/clip-vit-large-patch14'
    model=CLIPClassifier(62,cm,False).to(dev)
    model=DDP(model,device_ids=[lr],find_unused_parameters=False)
    bp,hp=[],[]
    for n,p in model.named_parameters():
        if p.requires_grad:(hp if 'classifier' in n else bp).append(p)
    opt=torch.optim.AdamW([{'params':bp,'lr':blr},{'params':hp,'lr':blr*10}],weight_decay=0.01)
    tsteps=len(tl)*ep;sch=torch.optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(opt,tsteps)
    crit=nn.CrossEntropyLoss();sc=torch.cuda.amp.GradScaler()
    bv=0.0;lf=open(os.path.join(ld,'metrics.jsonl'),'w') if im else None;step=0
    for e in range(ep):
        model.train();ts.set_epoch(e);rl,rc,rt=0.,0,0;t0=time.time()
        for imgs,labs,_ in tl:
            imgs,labs=imgs.to(dev),labs.to(dev);opt.zero_grad()
            with torch.cuda.amp.autocast():lo=model(imgs);loss=crit(lo,labs)
            sc.scale(loss).backward();sc.unscale_(opt)
            torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(),1.0)
            sc.step(opt);sc.update();sch.step();step+=1
            rl+=loss.item()*labs.size(0);rc+=(lo.argmax(1)==labs).sum().item();rt+=labs.size(0)
            if im and step%100==0:lf.write(json.dumps({'step':step,'loss':rl/rt,'train_acc':rc/rt})+'\n');lf.flush()
        model.eval();vc,vt=0,0
        with torch.no_grad():
            for imgs,labs,_ in vl:
                imgs,labs=imgs.to(dev),labs.to(dev)
                with torch.cuda.amp.autocast():lo=model(imgs)
                vc+=(lo.argmax(1)==labs).sum().item();vt+=labs.size(0)
        vct=torch.tensor([vc,vt],device=dev,dtype=torch.long);dist.all_reduce(vct)
        va=vct[0].item()/max(vct[1].item(),1)
        if im:
            lf.write(json.dumps({'step':step,'val_acc':va,'epoch':e+1})+'\n');lf.flush()
            print(f'E{e+1}/{ep} val_acc={va:.4f} time={time.time()-t0:.0f}s')
            if va>bv:
                bv=va;torch.save({'model_state_dict':model.module.state_dict(),'clip_model':cm,'val_acc':va,'epoch':e+1},os.path.join(cd,'best.pt'))
                print(f'Saved best: {va:.4f}')
    if im:lf.close();print('Done')
    dist.destroy_process_group()
if __name__=='__main__':main()
